PowerShell(cd d:\\SMS\\student-management-system; $runId = \(gh run list --workflow docs-organization.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId -q '.[0].databaseId'\); gh run view $runId)

PowerShell(cd d:\\SMS\\student-management-system; $runId = \(gh run list --workflow docs-organization.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId -q '.[0].databaseId'\); gh run view $runId --log-failed 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 100)
PowerShell(gh run view --json jobs -q '.jobs[] | select\(.conclusion=="failure"\) | {name: .name, conclusion: .conclusion, steps: [.steps[] | select\(.conclusion=="failure"\) | .name]}')

PowerShell(gh run view $\(gh run list -w ci-cd-pipeline.yml -L 1 --json databaseId -q '.[0].databaseId'\) --json jobs | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty jobs | Where-Object {$_.conclusion -eq "failure"} | Select-Object name, conclusion)

PowerShell(gh run list --limit 50 --json databaseId,name,conclusion,createdAt | ConvertFrom-Json | Where-Object {$_.conclusion -eq "failure"} | Sort-Object -Property createdAt -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(gh api repos/bs1gr/AUT_MIEEK_SMS/deployments --jq '.[] | {id, environment, state, created_at, updated_at}')

PowerShell(gh run list --limit 100 --json databaseId,name,conclusion,createdAt | ConvertFrom-Json | Where-Object {$_.conclusion -eq "failure"} | ForEach-Object {gh run delete $_.databaseId --confirm 2>&1} | Select-Object -Last 20)

PowerShell(gh run list --limit 100 --json databaseId,name,conclusion | ConvertFrom-Json | Where-Object {$_.conclusion -eq "failure"} | ForEach-Object {Write-Host "Deleting run: $\($_.databaseId\) - $\($_.name\)"; gh run delete $_.databaseId -y} | Select-Object -Last 20)
PowerShell(gh run view 26601547140 --json jobs | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty jobs | Where-Object {$_.conclusion -eq "failure"} | Select-Object name, conclusion)
PowerShell(gh api repos/bs1gr/AUT_MIEEK_SMS/deployments --jq '.[] | select\(.environment=="production"\) | {id, state, ref, created_at, updated_at}')

PowerShell(gh api repos/bs1gr/AUT_MIEEK_SMS/deployments | ConvertFrom-Json | Where-Object {$_.environment -eq "production"} | Select-Object -First 3 | Format-List id,state,ref,created_at,updated_at,description)
PowerShell(gh workflow run cleanup-deployments.yml -f environment=production -f keep_count=1 -f dry_run=false)
PowerShell(gh api repos/bs1gr/AUT_MIEEK_SMS/deployments -q 'sort_by\(-.created_at\)[0:3] | .[] | {id: .id, environment: .environment, ref: .ref, created_at: .created_at}')
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem installer/dist/ | Format-Table Name, @{Label="Size \(MB\)"; Expression={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB, 2\)}}, LastWriteTime -AutoSize)

PowerShell(gh release view v1.18.23 --json assets | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty assets | Format-Table name, @{Label="Size \(MB\)"; Expression={[math]::Round\($_.size/1MB, 2\)}}, createdAt -AutoSize)
